name_cn:
Genuine leather
Restock
Lo*we🔥Amazona mini New version🛍️ Tote bag🌟 Can be used with a longer calfskin top handle or a shorter hand-woven handle* This small size is made of calfskin, featuring a large contrasting color Anagram embossing on the front. Carry over shoulder or with top handle* Calfskin strap closure. Two internal slip pockets* Calfskin lining* Even though it's mini, the capacity isn't small* Sufficient for daily commuting* The Tote can also be worn crossbody, truly freeing your hands* It's just wonderful👏
size :22*9*19.5cm
Model: 3072
